meaning: adj.流动的,如流的,平滑的,(文章等)流畅的,通顺的
examples: This can prevent air from flowing freely to the lungs.
His handwriting, from earliest young manhood, was flowing and graceful.
All flowing water, though it appears to be uniform, is actually divided into extensive inner surfaces, or layers, moving against one another.
Because in theory, the HOV lanes are flowing more freely than the stop and go traffic.
Therefore, the countries are keen to keep the trust money flowing in and the creditors out.
